name: dogfu
description: Sales toolkit on the dogfu CLI: lead-research (Discover → Qualify → Enrich → CRM), lead-touch (cold outreach cadence in Close), lead-engage (work live deals — opportunities — from first engagement to close), lead-worklist (read-only cross-phase worklist — the prioritized leads to work now, across all stages, with context), and crm-cleanup (read-only CRM health audit), plus berlin-theme — Berlin's brand style guide for on-brand sales collateral.
